title: galium californicum var. miguelense
intro: Galium californicum var. miguelense, also known as California bedstraw or Santa Cruz bedstraw, is a perennial herb native to the western coast of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote the healing of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Galium californicum var. miguelense is often used as a tincture or tea, and can be combined with other herbs to create a topical salve for wound care and skin issues.
